1.content:
What flavors were the ice creams Bart could choose from?

(a) vanilla
(b) coffee made with real caffeinated coffee.
(c) vodka made with real vodka.
(d) monster energy drink made with real monster energy drink.
(e) marijuana made with real marijuana.
1.title: What are the flavors of ice cream

11.content:
So as Bart grabs the vanilla ice cream, Lisa says phew I thought you were going to grab a different flavor of ice cream. Well yes I would have but then I wouldn't be a big brother if my baby sister accidentally got high, drunk, or a sugar rush. How does Lisa react to seeing her brother finally being a responsible big brother even though he's not in charge of babysitting?

(a) has Bart help bathe Maggie
(b) has Bart help change Maggie
(c) has Bart take care of Maggie by himself, and she's only there if he gets stuck.
11.title: (a)

111.content:
So once Bart and Lisa get Maggie in the bathroom for her bath. Bart helps Maggie get undressed while Lisa fills the bathtub. So once Maggie is naked is the bathtub ready for her. Yes? No? Does she have to go potty? What does Bart do to help Lisa once Maggie is in the tub?

(a) yes and Lisa asks Bart to wash Maggie so that she can make sure Maggie stays in the tub.
(b) yes and Lisa asks Bart to make sure Maggie stays in the tub so that she can wash Maggie.
(c) no it's not ready and so now does Bart have Maggie sit on the toilet just in case she has to go potty, or wait till she starts showing signs that she has to go potty.
111.title: (a)

112.content:
So once Bart and Lisa get Maggie to her room. Bart gets her onesie off while Lisa gets the supplies out to change her diaper. Who actually changes her while who makes sure she stays put? Why did she remove her diaper? Do they work as a team?

(a) Bart changes her diaper while Lisa holds her still, before Maggie was put on the table she took her diaper because she couldn't wait any longer to ger her dirty diaper off.
(b) Lisa changes her diaper while Bart holds her still, before Maggie was put on the table she took her diaper off because she had to go potty but she couldn't actually get to the potty because her siblings put her on the changing table immediately after she took the diaper off. Did she pee on them or did she hold it and tell that she has to go potty?
(c) she tried to take her diaper off but since both siblings were working as a team to change her diaper. She had no opportunity to remove her diaper. Did one or both siblings pick up on why she's trying to take her diaper off, and then take her to the toilet?
112.title: (b)

1122.content: Does she pee on them or holds it?
1122.title: (b)

11221.content: Which sibling gets more pee on them?
11221.title: She pees on them

112211.content: Since Lisa is doing all the work she gets soaked with pee, while Bart only got a little wet when he went to hold Maggie still for Lisa. Who does Maggie apologize to first?
112211.title: Lisa

choices: Bart, Bart was holding her still By her legs right below her waist
Lisa, Bart kept her still by his hands on her crotch leaving room to wipe her
112212.content: You would think that Lisa would have gotten soaked, but not this time for its Bart who gets soaked. How did Bart get soaked if all he had to do was keep Maggie still? Who does Maggie apologize to first?
112212.title: Bart

choices: Her bladder alerts them by peeing, that they need to take Maggie to go potty
11222.content: Maggie holds it the whole time Lisa and Bart are changing her diaper. Does she tell them that she has to pee before they finish changing her?
11222.title: She holds it

choices: Asks if she'll help him potty train Maggie once the check list is completed
Asks if she can convince mom to let him babysit his sisters
113.content: Ok Bart I'll believe you're finally being a responsible big brother after you complete this check list that I made for myself when I'm babysitting Maggie. So let me get this straight if I complete your check list you'll tell mom that she can trust me. Does Bart agree immediately or does he want something in return?
113.title: (c)

choices: Only because she should've reminded him to grab the vanilla ice cream
12.content: So Bart makes a bowl of ice cream for himself and Maggie. When all of a sudden just as Maggie swallows her first spoonful of ice cream, Lisa screams at Bart you gave Maggie coffee flavored ice cream. So what Lisa I'm eating, but Bart that ice cream is made with real caffeinated coffee. Oops I'm sorry Lisa and I guess we got to put up with a sugar high two year old. Does Lisa feel like it's somewhat her fault for not keeping an eye on what ice cream Bart grabbed or not?
12.title: (b)

122.content: Lisa says. "Bart! There's no we this time, and since you accidentally got Maggie high on sugar. She's your problem until mom and Homer return." Can Bart handle Maggie being high on sugar a lone?
122.title: No

info.brief_description: What happens while Lisa babysits her siblings
info.description:
This rating is because Bart accidentally gives flavored ice cream that shouldn't even be given to a eleven year old let a lone a two year old.

Bart and Maggie are eating lunch, and Bart starts not wanting to eat his peas. So Lisa says that he and Maggie get to eat ice cream only if they eat all their food. So Bart and Maggie eat everything on their plate, and so Lisa as promised tells Bart that he gets to pick the ice cream this time. What flavor of ice cream does he pick and did he accidentally give Maggie that flavor instead of the vanilla ice cream, or was it the vanilla flavor?
